response: You possess a green US-style plug and need to insert it into one of three available wall outlets: one with round pins, one with flat pins, or one with three pins. Which socket is the correct choice?

meta.user: You have a green US plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
